derived.causal_summary: Ran a verify-first batch fix over batch-4 scouted candidates: 9 confirmed by gpt-5.5-fast deep-dive and implemented with regression tests; 11 excluded as policy/migration/unconfirmed. Fixes: warm-tier savings metric structurally locked at ~67% (fullContentTokens captured before 150-char truncation; 3x kept as fallback); all-anchors-missing branch returning hardcoded returnedTokens:0/savingsPercent:100 (recomputed from estimateTokens, mirroring partial-match branch); formatAgeString returning NaN months ago for invalid ISO (Number.isNaN guard -> never sentinel); shadow promotion gate counting zero-delta uniform-signal cycles as improvements (MIN_NDCG_IMPROVEMENT epsilon + empty Map on zero total); dead adapter-common ternary misclassifying EPIPE/ECONNRESET as BLOCKED (-> FAIL); check-graph-metadata-shape spurious WARNING for full packet_id in last_active_child_id (basename fallback existence test); cli-gemini auth pre-flight calling non-existent gemini config list (filesystem probe of ~/.gemini/oauth_creds.json); cli-codex auth pre-flight calling unrecognized codex auth status exit-2 (-> codex login status); context-server token-budget envelope leaving constitutionalCount and envelope.summary desynced from survivors after pop loop (post-loop recompute). All 9 regression tests pass; system-spec-kit npm run build exit 0.
